notes: Newbold XIII, XXI, XXII, who calls it f.68r
Outer Circle, starting at the marker
Spiralling lines, transcribed as radiating. Clock position indicated is that
of point at outer circle. 4 are long (up to central circe) and 4 are short
Inside circle. Top left and top right as L0 label, bottom as 3-line blocked paragraph
